# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 delivers the Skia m151 engine, allocation-free interop hot paths, and WASM .NET 11 support. The release tracks Chrome milestone 151 with multiple upstream bug-fix merges, adds zero-copy Span APIs for SKShaper and SKColor parsing, and extends WebAssembly support to .NET 11 via Emscripten 5.0.6.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151, tracking the upstream Skia engine used by Chrome 151 and bringing its full set of rendering improvements into SkiaSharp. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Upstream m151 bug-fix merges** — Three rounds of cherry-picked fixes from the chrome/m151 branch keep the bundled engine current with the latest upstream corrections. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))
- **CPU raster regression restored** — Re-enables SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT, which was accidentally dropped in an earlier native build. Apps that render via the CPU raster backend should see normal performance again. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing gains ReadOnlySpan overloads and is faster** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char> to avoid string allocations, and the hex parsing logic itself is measurably faster for all callers. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **Zero-copy Span reads for SKShaper glyph results** — SKShaper glyph buffers are now read through ReadOnlySpan rather than per-element interop calls, removing a hot allocation on every shaping run. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
- **Allocation-free tag parsing in SKFourByteTag and HarfBuzzSharp.Tag** — Both tag types previously allocated a char[4] on every Parse call. The implementations now use stack-allocated spans, reducing GC pressure in layout-heavy workloads. ([#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408))
- **GRContextOptions unsafe modifier removed** — An unnecessary unsafe modifier was removed from GRContextOptions, making it usable in projects that do not allow unsafe code. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking the underlying native image handle when the crop rectangle was applied. The handle is now released correctly. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## Platform

- **WebAssembly .NET 11 support via Emscripten 5.0.6** — Adds the Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries required to build and run SkiaSharp in WASM applications targeting .NET 11. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))
- **WASM build warning eliminated** — A duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM macro definition in the Skia submodule caused redefinition warnings on every Emscripten build. The redundant definition is now removed. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Adds the Emscripten 5.0.6 libraries that include the updated HarfBuzz 14.2.1 for WASM, and removes hot per-call allocations from HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 and HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | WebAssembly support across two releases: eliminated the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition warning from the Skia submodule and added the Emscripten 5.0.6 libraries for .NET 11. Also contributed a cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness. ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 added the zero-copy SKShaper Span API, allocation-free tag parsing, SKColor ReadOnlySpan overloads, the GRContextOptions cleanup, and a further set of upstream m151 fixes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the initial round of upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes, plus the WASM build-warning cleanup.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
